name: Reducir complejidad del backend manteniendo validaciones

description: Baseline: 8,852 lines across 63 files. All tests pass, 0 type errors.

asi.hypothesis: Baseline measurement. Backend has 8,852 lines of code (excluding blank lines and comments), 63 files. Tests and types pass. Key complexity areas: bookings/capacity (8+ files), distributed availability logic between schedule and staff.

description: Eliminated duplicate functions: getActiveBookingCountForSlot and getActiveBookingCountForStaffOnDate (duplicates of countActiveSlotBookings/countActiveStaffBookingsOnDate). Saved 31 lines.

asi.hypothesis: Removed 2 unused duplicate functions from capacity-check.service.ts. These were re-exported via barrel but never consumed. Net reduction: 31 lines. No functional change, all tests pass.

description: Eliminated barrel file capacity.service.ts. Updated 10+ consumers and 3 test files to import directly from specific modules. Reduced 1 file and 52 lines of code.

asi.hypothesis: Removed barrel file anti-pattern. Direct imports are more maintainable and eliminate indirection. Updated all consumers across bookings, reservations, citizen, and tests. Net reduction: 52 lines, 1 file.

description: Extracted validation helpers in staff.router.ts: parseDefaultCapacity and validateBooleanField. Eliminated duplicate validation blocks in create/update handlers. Saved 18 lines, improved maintainability.

asi.hypothesis: Added 2 helper functions (9 lines total) but eliminated ~27 lines of duplicated validation logic in create/update handlers. Net 18 lines saved. Code is more maintainable with single source of truth for validations.
asi.duplication_removed: defaultDailyCapacity and boolean validations in create/update
